products.title: Executive Black
products.description: A masterful fusion of understated elegance and horological precision. The Executive Black is forged from grade 5 titanium, offering unparalleled strength with a weightless feel on the wrist.
products.shortDescription: Grade 5 titanium automatic watch with sapphire crystal, 42mm case and 100m water resistance.
products.semanticDescription: Luxury black mechanical men's watch from the Heritage Collection featuring grade 5 titanium case, automatic Calibre 4 movement, sapphire crystal glass, 42mm diameter, and 100m water resistance. Minimalist exhibition caseback design ideal for formal and business environments. Combines understated elegance with exceptional durability and horological precision.

products.title: Silver Heritage
products.description: A silver-toned masterpiece that embodies the timeless spirit of traditional horology. The Silver Heritage pairs a polished stainless steel case with an automatic movement of quiet refinement.
products.shortDescription: Polished stainless steel automatic watch with a refined silver dial and classic proportions.
products.semanticDescription: Elegant silver stainless steel men's dress watch featuring an automatic winding movement, sapphire crystal with anti-reflective coating, slim 39mm profile, and sunray silver dial. Classic heritage design perfect for formal occasions and boardroom environments.

products.title: The Obsidian Dial
products.description: An ultra-thin masterwork in black. The Obsidian Dial redefines minimalist luxury with a deep lacquered dial that draws the eye into infinite depth, housed in a case of just 6.9mm.
products.shortDescription: Ultra-thin 6.9mm case with deep obsidian lacquered dial and precision hand-wound movement.
products.semanticDescription: Ultra-thin luxury men's dress watch from the Heritage Ultra-Thin collection. Features a deep obsidian lacquered dial, hand-wound precision movement, and a svelte 6.9mm case profile. Minimalist design with platinum-plated indices and alligator leather strap, ideal for black tie events and formal occasions.

products.title: Chronograph Monopusher
products.description: A single pusher governs every function of this extraordinary chronograph. Inspired by vintage racing timekeepers, the Monopusher delivers split-second precision through an exquisitely refined column-wheel mechanism.
products.shortDescription: Vintage-inspired single-pusher chronograph with column-wheel mechanism and 48-hour power reserve.
products.semanticDescription: Vintage-inspired men's luxury chronograph watch with a single-pusher mechanism and column-wheel complication. Rose gold PVD case, sapphire exhibition caseback, 48-hour power reserve, and hand-applied hour markers. Combines classic watchmaking heritage with precise timing functionality.

products.title: Lunar Complication
products.description: Tracking the celestial dance of the moon with breathtaking accuracy, the Lunar Complication displays moonphase, date, and perpetual calendar through a breathtaking sapphire dial window that reveals the cosmos within.
products.shortDescription: Perpetual calendar with moonphase complication and astronomical display through sapphire dial aperture.
products.semanticDescription: Prestigious men's luxury watch with perpetual calendar and moonphase complication from the Astronomical Series. White gold 42mm case, sapphire dial aperture revealing celestial displays, 72-hour power reserve automatic movement, and hand-engraved caseback. For collectors who appreciate haute horlogerie and astronomical precision.

products.title: Deep Sea Phantom
products.description: Engineered for the abyss, the Deep Sea Phantom is rated to 1000m and constructed from grade 5 titanium with a helium escape valve. Where other watches fail, the Phantom prevails.
products.shortDescription: Professional dive watch rated to 1000m with titanium case, helium escape valve and luminescent dial.
products.semanticDescription: Professional luxury dive watch rated to 1000m from the Aquatic Series. Grade 5 titanium 44mm case with ceramic uni-directional bezel, helium escape valve, Super-LumiNova luminescence, and triple-lock screw-down crown. Built for serious divers and extreme aquatic environments.

products.title: Titanium Skeleton
products.description: Every component is visible, every gear celebrates its purpose. The Titanium Skeleton strips away all obscuration to reveal a 272-component hand-finished movement suspended in aerospace-grade titanium.
products.shortDescription: Open-worked skeleton dial with 272 hand-finished components in aerospace titanium, inspired by aviation.
products.semanticDescription: Ultra-premium men's skeleton watch from the Aero Series featuring an open-worked dial revealing 272 hand-finished components with flying tourbillon. Aerospace titanium alloy 45mm case, double-dome sapphire crystal, and 60-hour power reserve. Aviation-inspired design for watch connoisseurs.

products.title: Carbon Tachymeter
products.description: Born on the pit lane, perfected in the laboratory. The Carbon Tachymeter encases a high-frequency automatic chronograph within a full forged carbon fibre case, weighing under 60 grams.
products.shortDescription: Forged carbon fibre chronograph with tachymeter bezel and high-frequency automatic movement for motorsport.
products.semanticDescription: Motorsport-inspired luxury chronograph from the Motorsport Series featuring forged carbon fibre case under 60 grams, high-frequency automatic movement, tachymeter bezel, and 43mm case. Born on the pit lane for racing drivers and performance enthusiasts who demand both precision and extreme lightness.

products.title: Velocity X
products.description: Forged titanium. 1/1000th second chronograph. Unyielding under pressure. The Velocity X is the definitive sporting instrument for those who live at the absolute limit of performance.
products.shortDescription: Forged titanium chronograph with 1/1000th second precision, anti-magnetic movement and extreme performance engineering.
products.semanticDescription: High-performance luxury men's sports chronograph from the Velocity Series featuring forged titanium monobloc case, 1/1000th second chronograph complication, anti-magnetic silicon escapement, and ceramic tachymeter bezel. 44mm case, 200m water resistance, and 60-hour power reserve. The definitive instrument for precision timing at the limits of performance.

products.title: Carbon Racer
products.description: Forged in the crucible of motorsport engineering. A relentless pursuit of weight reduction meets unparalleled horological precision, encased in a pure carbon fiber monolith.
products.shortDescription: Ultra-light 48g forged carbon fiber case with Calibre CR-X1 column-wheel chronograph and 72h power reserve.
products.semanticDescription: Ultra-premium men's motorsport chronograph from the Motorsport Series. Forged carbon fibre monobloc case weighing just 48g, Calibre CR-X1 skeletonized column-wheel chronograph with black DLC anglage finishing, sapphire exhibition caseback, 72-hour power reserve, and 100m water resistance. The ultimate fusion of motorsport engineering and haute horlogerie.

products.title: Noir Chic
products.description: A masterclass in monochromatic depth. Forged from aerospace-grade matte ceramic, revealing layers of darkness that no other material can achieve.
products.shortDescription: Aerospace-grade matte ceramic case with Vantablack dial, Caliber 9X-N movement and 30 ATM water resistance.
features: Vantablack dial — absorbs 99.96% of visible light
products.semanticDescription: Luxury women's fashion watch in aerospace-grade matte ceramic featuring a Vantablack dial that absorbs 99.96% of visible light, Caliber 9X-N movement, 30 ATM water resistance, and 72-hour power reserve. 41mm case with 9.8mm slim profile and 68g weight achieved through 14-day ceramic sintering. Monochromatic dark luxury for those who prefer presence over noise.

products.title: Rose Gold Essence
products.description: A study in luminous reduction. Forged from proprietary 18k rose gold alloy, the Essence strips away the superfluous, leaving only the pure, uninterrupted flow of time displayed against a minimalist void.
products.shortDescription: 18k rose gold alloy case with domed edge-to-edge sapphire crystal and refined automatic movement.
products.semanticDescription: Luxury women's elegant watch in proprietary 18k rose gold alloy from The Essence Collection. Features domed edge-to-edge sapphire crystal, automatic self-winding movement, 40mm minimalist void dial, and exhibition caseback. 42-hour power reserve and 30m water resistance. The ultimate expression of luminous reduction and feminine horological refinement.

products.title: Obsidian Leather Strap
products.description: Hand-stitched from full-grain obsidian calf leather, this quick-release strap pairs perfectly with the Rose Gold Essence for a striking monochromatic contrast.
products.shortDescription: Full-grain obsidian calf leather quick-release strap for the Rose Gold Essence.
products.semanticDescription: Luxury full-grain obsidian calf leather watch strap with quick-release spring bars, hand-stitched contrast thread, and polished rose gold deployant buckle. Designed as a curated pairing for the Rose Gold Essence.

products.title: Essence Cuff
products.description: An architectural 18k rose gold cuff designed to complement the Rose Gold Essence watch. Wear them together for an unbroken line of luminous metal along the wrist.
products.shortDescription: 18k rose gold architectural cuff bracelet, designed to pair with the Rose Gold Essence watch.
features: Matches Rose Gold Essence alloy batch
products.semanticDescription: Luxury 18k rose gold architectural open-cuff bracelet from the Essence Accessories collection. Polished and brushed dual finish with adjustable sizing, designed to pair as a matching set with the Rose Gold Essence watch for a seamless luminous wrist aesthetic.

products.title: Rose Gold Essence
products.description: An exercise in subtleity and luminous balance. The 32mm case captures ambient light, reflecting a warm rose gold tone against a deep void-black dial. Designed for modern women who appreciate refined elegance and timeless sophistication.
products.shortDescription: 32mm rose gold luxury watch with luminous detailing and minimalist elegance.
products.semanticDescription: Luxury rose gold women's watch featuring a refined 32mm case, sapphire crystal protection, premium quartz movement, and a minimalist aesthetic designed for elegant occasions, formal events, and daily sophistication.

products.title: Diamond Grace
products.description: Precision engineering paired with delicate diamond accents. Diamond Grace floats effortlessly on the wrist, combining timeless luxury with contemporary craftsmanship.
products.shortDescription: Luxury diamond-set women's watch designed for graceful everyday elegance.
products.semanticDescription: Luxury women's diamond watch featuring precision Swiss movement, elegant diamond accents, sapphire crystal protection, and refined styling suitable for formal occasions, luxury gifting, and premium everyday wear.

products.title: Sapphire Silhouette
products.description: A masterclass in understated luxury. The Sapphire Silhouette presents a 36mm mirror-polished case housing an automatic movement visible through a domed sapphire crystal. Designed for women who command presence through refinement.
products.shortDescription: 36mm automatic women's watch with domed sapphire crystal and mirror-polished case.
products.semanticDescription: Luxury 36mm women's automatic watch from The Aurelia collection. Mirror-polished stainless steel case with domed sapphire crystal and exhibition caseback. Refined and understated for formal occasions.

products.title: Rose Gold Mesh
products.description: Lightweight and luminous, the Rose Gold Mesh floats on the wrist through a precision-woven stainless steel mesh bracelet with a warm rose gold PVD finish. A seamless union of texture and tone.
products.shortDescription: Rose gold PVD mesh bracelet watch with minimalist dial for effortless everyday elegance.
products.semanticDescription: Luxury women's rose gold PVD mesh bracelet watch from the Celeste collection. Precision-woven stainless steel mesh strap with minimalist sunray dial and sapphire crystal. Lightweight and effortlessly elegant for everyday wear.

products.title: Obsidian Dial
products.description: Monochromatic minimalism taken to its extreme. The Nova Obsidian features an ultra-thin case with a fully desaturated void dial, achieving a graphic tension between light and dark that transcends conventional watch design.
products.shortDescription: Ultra-thin women's watch with void obsidian dial and monochrome minimalist aesthetic.
products.semanticDescription: Ultra-thin women's watch from the Nova collection. Void obsidian dial with matte black PVD finish, sapphire crystal, and quartz precision movement. A graphic study in minimalist watch design for the modern woman.

products.title: Ceramic Night
products.description: Fluid ceramic integration creating a seamless band of deep onyx across the wrist. The Ceramic Night challenges structural norms while maintaining perfect weight distribution, resulting in a sculptural object that moves with you.
products.shortDescription: High-density ceramic fashion watch with avant-garde form and seamless onyx integration.
products.semanticDescription: High-density black ceramic women's fashion watch from the Avant Series. Seamless ceramic band integration with scratch-resistant surface, sapphire crystal, and Swiss quartz movement. An avant-garde sculptural form for bold feminine expression.

products.title: Luna White
products.description: An exploration of structural complexity within a completely desaturated palette. Luna White's bleached ceramic case and alabaster dial create a capsule of absolute lightness — a watch that seems to dissolve against the wrist.
products.shortDescription: Ethereal white ceramic fashion watch with alabaster dial and luminous structural complexity.
products.semanticDescription: Ethereal white ceramic women's fashion watch from the Luna Collection. Bleached ceramic case, alabaster dial, luminous hands, and sapphire crystal with Swiss quartz movement. A study in pure structural lightness for the modern woman.
